# AAC Speech & Communication

## Description
An affordable, highly customizable Augmentative and Alternative Communication (AAC) application designed to give a voice to individuals with speech and communication difficulties.

## Key Features
- Fully customizable symbol and text communication boards.
- Accessible, user-friendly interface optimized for mobile and tablet devices.
- Focus on affordability and user autonomy.

## Links
- [Homepage](https://aacspeech.app)
- [Google Play Store](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.cm.aac)
- [Amazon Appstore](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GJTDZ4CJ)
